chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-72 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 22-01-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen, Assistant P.G for the State. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far. Even on the last date of hearing, same was the position. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
